name: maguerrieri-toolbox
description: Mario's portable Claude Code conventions and workflows

plugins.name: defaults
plugins.description: Meta-plugin that pulls in the full default set via dependencies

plugins.name: generate
plugins.description: Diverse bulk ideation with a pluggable Promotion adapter (generate skill + /generate command)

plugins.name: yaml
plugins.description: YAML editing guardrails: surface-triggered gotcha reference + mandatory parse-verify step

plugins.name: gm
plugins.description: System-agnostic, persona-driven solo RPG game master (dice, oracles, adapters, versioned saves)

plugins.name: ticket-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end issue workflow (start/finish/spawn/epic) with a pluggable tracker (GitHub Issues or Jira) and profile
